notes_for_human_reviewer: Solid intermediate. Names the three-section format and proposes restructuring. Audits actions for owner/due/specificity and addresses both TBDs with concrete resolution moves. Catches both attribution issues (CR-031 'team agreed' vs K. Olafsson's concerns; CR-033 'everyone on board' vs absent Y. Mbeki) AND evaluative phrasing ('great discussion', 'really interesting', 'got quite heated'). Cuts the F. Demir aside with reasoning. Addresses timing with specific apology-line move, expands distribution to include absent attendees and vendor. Names correction posture. Living-artifact tolerance widened to 2 because the action-tracker discipline is named but lightly — proposes 'a single action tracker' but does not emphasise the pre-meeting review as the first agenda item or chase-privately discipline. Not hire-ready because the analysis is competent but the closing is bundled rather than tiered (immediate-now vs going-forward).
